pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version to 3.1.5 to align with Java 21 and modern Spring ecosystem.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x does not support Java 21 as a baseline; upgrading is required to compile and run on JDK 21.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Java version property to 21 to target the new JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project compiles against Java 17, failing to utilize Java 21 features or potentially causing compatibility issues with Spring Boot 3.1+ which expects Java 17+ but is optimized for 21.
